description: Miscellaneous portfolio settings — straddle width multiplier, leg delay, and action-on filters.

fields.label: Trail Wait Trade
fields.description: Trail the Wait & Trade price for re-executed legs.

fields.label: Straddle Width Multiplier
fields.description: Multiplied by ATM straddle width to derive dynamic SL. 0.00 = disabled.

fields.label: Delay Between Legs in Sec.
fields.description: Seconds to wait between re-executing consecutive legs.

fields.label: On Target Action On
fields.description: Which target hit type triggers the configured action. Both/Fixed only/Trailing only.

fields.label: On SL Action On
fields.description: Which SL hit type triggers the configured action. Both/Fixed only/Trailing only.

fields.label: Description / Remarks
fields.description: Free-text description stored with the portfolio.

fields.label: Max Loss ($)
fields.description: If total P&L drops to this negative amount, flag the portfolio.

fields.label: Max Profit ($)
fields.description: If total P&L reaches this positive amount, flag the portfolio.
